showFloatingHelpersPanel: Na OpenFrontu prikaži lebdečo ploščo pomočnikov
hideFloatingHelpersPanel: Skrij lebdečo ploščo pomočnikov na OpenFront
Auto-Join & Helpers for OpenFront: Samodejno se pridruži & pomočnikom za OpenFront
Show floating helpers panel on OpenFront: Na OpenFrontu prikaži lebdečo ploščo pomočnikov
If openfront.io was already open when yo: Če je bil Openfront.io že odprt, ko ste namestili to razširitev, ta zavihek ponovno naložite enkrat. V nasprotnem primeru razširitev ne bo delovala na tem zavihku.
Adds a red marker to nation AI names on: Dodaja rdeči označevalec imenom AI na zemljevidu.
Highlights allies with remaining allianc: Poudarki zaveznikov s preostalim časom zavezništva.
Uporabljajte samo v igrah po meri.
Shows predicted enemy nuke landing point: Prikazuje napovedane sovražnikove točke in radij eksplozije.
Prikazuje napovedane sovražnikove nuklearne pristajalne točke in polmer eksplozije.
Shows enemy boat landing points. Red = t: Prikazuje sovražnikove pristajalne točke. Rdeča = ciljanje tebe, rumena = ciljanje drugih.
Hover an enemy to show high-damage atom: Postavite sovražnika, da pokaže visoko škodo atoma in vodikovih tarč.
Adds auto economy and population nuke ac: Dodaja avtoekonomijo in populacijo jedrskih ukrepov na igralno kolo.
Also show auto nuke options when right-c: Prikaži tudi avtomatske nuklearne možnosti pri desnem kliku zavezniških igralcev.
Team games only: blocks trades with play: Samo ekipne igre: blokira trgovanje z igralci, ki niso v vaši ekipi.
Blocks trades with players who are not o: Bloki trguje z igralci, ki niso v vaši ekipi.
Available only during an active team gam: Na voljo le med aktivno ekipno igro.
Dodaja GPM na igralčevo lebdečo ploščo.
Lists each team's total GPM in team game: Našteje skupno GPM vsake ekipe na ekipnih tekmah.
Shows observed ship and train trade impo: Prikazuje opaženi uvoz in izvoz ladje in vlak trgovine.
Shows observed trade imports and exports: Prikazuje opaženi trgovinski uvoz in izvoz.
Highlights structures with observed trad: Poudarki strukture z opaženimi trgovinskimi prihodki.
Hover a player to highlight the partner: Postavite akter poudariti partnerski industriji, ki spodbuja njihov izvoz.
Hover a player to highlight export partn: Postavite igralca, da poudari izvoz partnerjev.
Matches team lobbies with more than 4 pl: Ujema se z več kot 4 igralci na ekipo.
You can turn on all three at the same ti: Lahko vklopiš vse tri hkrati. Samo ena se mora ujemati.
Default case with no explicit starting g: Privzeti primer brez izrecnega zaganjanja zlata.
Include requires a match. Exclude blocks: Vključiti zahteva ujemanje. Izključi blokira možnost. Za zagon zlata zadostuje vsaka vključena vrednost, medtem ko se izključene vrednosti vedno zavrnejo.
analyticsOptInDescription: Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports coarse feature usage to help improve the extension. No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, or chat data.
Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports: Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports coarse feature usage to help improve the extension. No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, or chat data.
Only join lobbies whose max player count: Only join lobbies whose max player count is greater than this number.
You can turn on all four at the same tim: You can turn on all four at the same time. Only one of them has to match.
Send a transport with 1% troops, then re: Send a transport with 1% troops, then restore the attack ratio.
Moves alliance requests and renewal prom: Moves alliance requests and renewal prompts into a separate right-side window.
Right-click any tile to send a boat with: Right-click any tile to send a boat with 1% troops, then restores your ratio.
analyticsConsentIntro: This helps improve the extension by showing which helper features are used and where performance work matters most.
analyticsConsentTrackedFeatureToggles: Feature toggles, such as which helper was enabled or disabled.
analyticsConsentTrackedSummaries: Coarse usage summaries, such as how many helpers are enabled.
analyticsConsentTrackedVersionLanguage: Extension version and language, so issues can be compared across releases.
analyticsConsentAnonymousNoGameplay: No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, chat, or free-form gameplay data is sent.
analyticsConsentAnonymousLocalId: A random local analytics ID is created only after you enable this, and it is deleted when you turn it off.
This helps improve the extension by show: This helps improve the extension by showing which helper features are used and where performance work matters most.
Feature toggles, such as which helper wa: Feature toggles, such as which helper was enabled or disabled.
Coarse usage summaries, such as how many: Coarse usage summaries, such as how many helpers are enabled.
Extension version and language, so issue: Extension version and language, so issues can be compared across releases.
No OpenFront account, player names, lobb: No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, chat, or free-form gameplay data is sent.
A random local analytics ID is created o: A random local analytics ID is created only after you enable this, and it is deleted when you turn it off.
analyticsSupportText: Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fixes and improve helpers without sending gameplay details.
Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fi: Anonymous usage data helps prioritize fixes and improve helpers without sending gameplay details.
